section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025
sentence: At Brutal AI, we respect your privacy and believe humor should never cost your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how the Brutal AI mobile app operates and how your information (if any) is handled.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:🔍 Information We Collect
sentence: Brutal AI does not collect, store, or share any personal information.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:🔍 Information We Collect
sentence: The app works completely offline and does not require sign-up, login, or internet connection to chat.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:🔍 Information We Collect
sentence: All responses are generated locally from pre-loaded datasets inside the app.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:📱 Permissions
sentence: The app does not request camera, microphone, storage, or location permissions.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:📱 Permissions
sentence: If future updates add optional features (e.g., saving chats), you will be notified and allowed to opt-in.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:🎯 Purpose of the App
sentence: Brutal AI is an entertainment app designed to provide sarcastic, humorous, or “brutal” responses. It is not a real artificial intelligence and should not be used for advice, facts, or decision-making.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:🔒 Data Protection
sentence: Since we do not collect user data, there is no storage or transfer of personal information.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:🔒 Data Protection
sentence: No analytics, advertisements, or third-party tracking tools are used.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:⚖️ Legal Disclaimer
sentence: Brutal AI’s responses are automatically generated for fun and do not represent factual statements, opinions, or advice. Use of the app is entirely at your own discretion.

section: H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:📞 Contact Us
H1:Brutal AI – Privacy Policy > H2:Effective Date: October 29, 2025 Last Updated: October 29, 2025 > H3:📞 Contact Us
